ui_elements.help: this button also has an action to zoom the window
ui_elements.label: full screen button

ui_elements.description: First run. Corp facility on the east side. Two guards on patrol, a drone inbound. Extract the data chip from the server room and get out through the north exit. Don't get cocky — this is just a warm-up.
ui_elements.label: text
